title: Tell Proof — Open Genericness Taxonomy
description: Machine-readable benchmark mapping methodology tells (docs/05) to deterministic detectors in packages/core. Use for regression tests, research citations, and external evaluations.

tells.name: Default-font monoculture
tells.signature: Primary font-family is Inter / system-ui / Arial-class with ≥75% role coverage
tells.flipThreshold: familyCount weighted ratio ≥ 0.75 and family ∈ DEFAULT_SET

tells.name: Violet→pink hero gradient
tells.signature: Saturated violet/pink gradient as hero chrome

tells.name: AI-default accent hue
tells.signature: High-saturation accent against a near-black surface
tells.flipThreshold: dark surface L < 0.2 paired with accent saturation > 0.7

tells.name: Shadow on everything
tells.signature: Repeated non-none box-shadow across many containers
tells.flipThreshold: dominant shadow count ≥ max(3, 35% of samples)

tells.name: Radius monotone
tells.signature: One non-zero radius dominates the surface
tells.flipThreshold: dominant radius count ≥ max(5, 50% of samples)

tells.name: Gray mush
tells.signature: ≥5 near-duplicate neutrals in a tight ΔE cluster

tells.name: Acid / electric accent
tells.signature: Same detector as T3 — acid accent on dark surface

tells.name: Emoji as UI chrome
tells.signature: Emoji inside headings, buttons, or nav

tells.name: Near-duplicate values
tells.signature: Near-duplicate gray clusters reported on fingerprint

tells.name: Focus ring inconsistency
tells.signature: Low focus-visible coverage on interactive probes

tells.name: State gap
tells.signature: Missing hover and/or disabled coverage on probes

tells.name: Design system drift
tells.signature: Rendered surface diverges from DESIGN.md contract

tells.name: Responsive viewport drift
tells.signature: Tablet/mobile viewport matrix loses headings or controls vs desktop
tells.flipThreshold: secondary headingCount or buttonCount < 60% of desktop domSummary

benchmarkProtocol.capture: Playwright CapturePayload (committed JSON or live URL)
benchmarkProtocol.score: report.measures.score when present; else generic*12 + drift*7
benchmarkProtocol.proof: compareProofReports / compareProofMatrices / verifyProofPatch — disposable checkout only
benchmarkProtocol.scenarioMatrix: route × viewport × theme × interaction (± authRole schema)
